notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Brennan Bernardino picks off Pete Crow-Armstrong at 1st on throw to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto walks. Matt Shaw to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Troy Johnston. Seiya Suzuki scores. Ian Happ to 3rd. Nico Hoerner to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit for the cycle
notableEvents.detail: Single, double, triple, and home run in the same game

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw walks. Ian Happ scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Pedro Ramírez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston hit by pitch. Tyler Freeman to 3rd. Hunter Goodman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston plunked
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston hit by pitch. Tyler Freeman to 3rd. Hunter Goodman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien flies out to left fielder Ian Happ.

notableEvents.label: Brett Sullivan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Sullivan lines out to shortstop Dansby Swanson.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston flies out to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.

notableEvents.label: Brett Sullivan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Sullivan called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ reaches on a fielder's choice. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd. Seiya Suzuki advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Juan Mejia.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw walks. Ian Happ scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Pedro Ramírez to 2nd.
